name: Klotho and follistatin plasmid gene therapy
summary: Combination nonviral plasmid gene-therapy program pairing klotho with follistatin, currently represented by a recruiting early phase 1 no-results healthy-adult registry.
aliases: Injectable combination klotho and follistatin plasmid gene therapy
mechanism_summary: Combines plasmid-delivered klotho with follistatin, linking systemic hormone/protein signaling and muscle-related myostatin-axis biology, but current human evidence is registry-only and no-results.

open_questions: Whether the recruiting study posts interpretable safety and biomarker results
Whether any functional, epigenetic-age, inflammatory, or physical-performance changes are attributable to klotho, follistatin, or nonspecific study effects
Whether single-arm healthy-volunteer data can support any aging-directed public claim
